title: delve and golang security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
delve
[1.25.2-1.0.1]
- Disable DWARF compression which has issues (Alex Burmashev)

[1.25.2-1]
- Update to Delve 1.25.2
- Resolves: RHEL-111801

golang
[1.25.3-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.3
- Resolves: RHEL-121220

[1.25.1-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.1
- Resolves: RHEL-116850

[1.25.0-2]
- Revert DWARF5 defaults
- Add elf5 to rpminspect.yaml
- Related: RHEL-109557

[1.25.0-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.0
- Set GOAMD64 to v2 to align with new architecture baselines
- Modify the modify_go.env.patch to reflect GOAMD64 baseline version change to v2
- Resolves: RHEL-109557
full_text:
delve
[1.25.2-1.0.1]
- Disable DWARF compression which has issues (Alex Burmashev)

[1.25.2-1]
- Update to Delve 1.25.2
- Resolves: RHEL-111801

golang
[1.25.3-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.3
- Resolves: RHEL-121220

[1.25.1-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.1
- Resolves: RHEL-116850

[1.25.0-2]
- Revert DWARF5 defaults
- Add elf5 to rpminspect.yaml
- Related: RHEL-109557

[1.25.0-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.0
- Set GOAMD64 to v2 to align with new architecture baselines
- Modify the modify_go.env.patch to reflect GOAMD64 baseline version change to v2
- Resolves: RHEL-109557

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-21815.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-58183.html
